full_text_tesim: Full page decoration of cross with border on f. 228v | Ornate geometric headpiece on f. 289v, with cross and lamp motifs | Geometric and zoomorphic headpieces, ff. 114v, 296r, 322r with bird-like motif | Minor geometric headpieces throughout, beginning f. 1r I Illuminated zoomorphic motifs throughout including birds, winged serpents and fish, beginning on f. 6r with bird carrying red sphere in beak; geometric bird, f. 35v, 62v; winged serpent, 42r, 84r, 178v, 196v, 352v | Geometric and vegetative decorations throughout
